name: SlideSpeek — AI Presentations
description: Create professional AI-generated PowerPoint presentations from a text prompt or outline. SlideSpeek uses AI to generate slide structure, content, speaker notes, and design layouts automatically.

tools_summary.name: create_presentation
tools_summary.description: Generate a full PowerPoint presentation from a topic or detailed prompt

tools_summary.name: create_from_outline
tools_summary.description: Generate a presentation from a structured outline you provide

tools_summary.name: get_presentation_status
tools_summary.description: Check the status of an in-progress presentation generation job

tools_summary.name: download_presentation
tools_summary.description: Get the download URL for a completed presentation (PPTX or PDF)

tools_summary.name: list_presentations
tools_summary.description: List recently generated presentations in your SlideSpeek account

setup_instructions:
1. Sign up at slidespeak.co
2. Go to Account Settings → API Keys → Generate New Key
3. Set SLIDESPEAK_API_KEY to your generated key
Note: SlideSpeek offers a free tier with limited monthly generations.
